name: balam
comment: Bun workspace covers the TypeScript frontend + shared types only. The backend is Python (apps/backend) managed by uv — see CLAUDE.md.

scripts.gen:api: uv --directory apps/backend run python scripts/dump_openapi.py > /tmp/balam-openapi.json && openapi-typescript /tmp/balam-openapi.json -o packages/shared/src/api.ts && biome format --write packages/shared/src/api.ts
